task_completion.description: Import the historical visitor records from the specified CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An import screen, file selection dialog showing 'historical_visitors.csv' in '~/Documents/', or a success message confirming the import.

task_completion.description: Select the existing profile for Sarah Chen from Deloitte.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A list or search result in the visitor management system showing 'Sarah Chen' (Deloitte) being selected for a new visit.

task_completion.description: Set the host for the visit to Michael Torres.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A check-in form with the 'Host' field filled out as 'Michael Torres'.

task_completion.description: Set the purpose of the visit to Contractor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A check-in form with the 'Purpose' field set to 'Contractor'.

task_completion.description: Complete the sign-in process so the visitor appears as currently signed-in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dashboard, active visitor log, or 'Currently Signed-In' list displaying Sarah Chen with the updated host and purpose.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the visitor management system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GUI of a visitor management application being used, not terminal commands executing backend scripts.

integrity.description: The agent imported the CSV file rather than manually creating the historical profile.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show an import dialog or file browser interacting with 'historical_visitors.csv' rather than manual data entry of the historical profile.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to fake the final output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final signed-in list is displayed within the actual visitor management application, not in a text editor or spreadsheet program.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The visitor to be checked in is 'Sarah Chen' from 'Deloitte'. The historical records must be imported from '/home/ga/Documents/historical_visitors.csv'. The updated host must be 'Michael Torres' and the updated purpose must be 'Contractor'.
